titles.ar: باب فِي أَنَّهُ إِذَا قِيلَ فِي الرَّجُلِ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ وَ كَانَ فِي وَلَدِهِ أَوْ وَلَدِ وَلَدِهِ فَإِنَّهُ هُوَ الَّذِي قِيلَ فِيهِ
titles.en: Chapter 127 – Regarding that when something is said regarding the man and does not happen to be in him, and it happens to be in his son, or a son of his son, so it is that which was said regarding him
